CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2002 Continued To Dec-03-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Order For Enforcement Of Settlement Pursuant To Mediation Agreement; Court Order For Enforcement Of Settlement Pursuant To "No Contact" Agreement; Court Order Clarifying Settlement Term That Plaintiff May Retain House And Pay Defendant $115,000. Declaration Of Steven T. Sager, And Memo P/A'S .
Off Calendar Jul-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kulwinder Ball, Esq., 415-421-4404, appeared on behalf of Plaintiff and moving party June Stelmak. Jason M. Erlich, Esq. MACDONALD BECKMAN, 415-956-6488, appeared on behalf of defendant and opposing party Elizabeth Stelmak.

Argued and the Court ordered $115,000 in escrow no later than August 4, 2002. Title transfer documents shall also be placed in escrow. Proposition 58 forms shall be signed. If documents are satisfactory then the funds shall be released. (AJR/KH) Reporter: Patricia Evezich CSR# 1193

For Award Of Service Of Summons Expenses
Off Calendar Jan-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kulwinder Kenea Ball, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF STEVEN T. SAGER 421-4404 for Plaintiff JUNE STELMAK moving for award of service of summons expenses and also appearing on behalf of cross-defendant JOSEPH STELMAK demurring party and also moving to strike the Cross-Complaint of Elizabeth Stelmak
Jason M. Erlich, Esq. of MacDONALD BECKMAN LLP 956-6488 for cross-complainant ELIZABETH STELMAK opposing party

Argued and the Court ruled as follows:
Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the claim of elder abuse.
Demurrer overruled as to cause of action for equitable indemnity and contribution.
Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to Cause of Action 4 for intentional inflcition of emotional distress.
Motion for award of service of summons expenses is granted in the amount of $340.00.
Cross-Defendant shall have an additional 10 days leave to answer.
(JJM/kh) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
